category_sources: Official Prover9 manual documents inference rules and theorem-proving behavior.
source_facts.description says Prover9 is an automated theorem prover for first-order and equational logic.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description uses the display form Prover9.
docs_sources: Official University of New Mexico Prover9 manual is the historical dedicated manual.
Prover9.org manual-2026 is an official current manual surface for Prover9 documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official Prover9 project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official project pages provide source archives rather than an official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies automated theorem proving for first-order and equational logic.
